title: lepidium boelckei
intro: Lepidium boelckei, also known as Peruvian pepper or Maca, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region, belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Lepidium boelckei include improved fertility, hormone balance, and stress relief, as well as potential anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Lepidium boelckei is commonly prepared as a powder or capsule and can also be consumed as a tea, adding it to smoothies or using it in herbal supplements.
